blurb:
Twiggy has already done this once. She was adopted from Mostly Mutts years ago, found a family she loved, and then a new cat joined the household and things didn't work out. No drama, no bad behavior — just a tortoiseshell who prefers to be the one and only. Now she's seven years old, about 12 pounds, and looking for round two.

She was a little spicy when she first came back in. That's fair. Her world got flipped upside down and she needed time to decompress. She's been in a foster home since then, settling back into herself. What her previous owner knows for sure: once Twiggy trusts you, she loves hard. She wants attention. She wants to be part of your life. She just needs to be the star of it.

She'd do best as your only cat. A dog might be okay depending on the dog, and older kids who know how to be calm around cats could work too. She's fully vaccinated, microchipped, combo tested negative, and spayed. Adoption fee is $175.

Mostly Mutts is in Kennesaw. Submit an inquiry through their website to get connected with her foster and set up a meet.
shelter_address: 3080 Kennesaw Due West Rd NW, Kennesaw, GA 30152
scoring_notes:
• Returned adopter with a loyal, loving track record makes her a relatable second-chance story for readers
• Solo-cat requirement narrows the pool but her fully vetted status and foster stability signal she's ready now
• Seven-year-old returnee with decompress time behind her signals a longer shelter journey that adds urgency to feature
